citations.title: Water fluoridation for the prevention of dental caries
citations.retrieval_query: fluoride dental caries prevention systematic review
citations.abstract: Demo abstract intentionally not used by the validator.
citations.body_text: Results: Water fluoridation probably reduces caries experience in children, although the magnitude of benefit is smaller in contemporary studies than in older studies. Discussion: The certainty of evidence varies by outcome, population, baseline caries risk, and availability of fluoride from other sources.
